reviews.comment:
Un oasis en medio del desierto, la verdad es increíble, cómodo amplio limpio ,un servicio excelente, y en medio de la Patagonia, me sorprendió lo lindo de la zona recomiendo recorrerla cuando se pueda

(Translated by Google)
An oasis in the middle of the desert, the truth is incredible, comfortable, spacious, clean, excellent service, and in the middle of Patagonia, I was surprised by how beautiful the area is. I recommend visiting it when you can.

reviewReply.comment: María buenas tardes! gracias por su comentario calificación, feliz de cada persona que nos visita, y mas aun se valla contento con nuestro servicio.

reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia en el Full. Primero no me cargaron los puntos por la compra. Segundo, Le pido una hamburguesa y dice 40 mins de demora. Entonces pedi el combo de mila con tomate y lechuga. Al abrirlo, se ve lo de la foto. Impresentable. Un pan quemado y una milanea sequita sequita. El ketchup es agregado mio😁. Al preguntarle a la cajera por el tomate y lechuga faltantes me dice "es que no tengo". Avisa antes, y por ahi pedia otra cosa!. El precio igual, fue "full" 🤑.
Los baños, impecables.

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience at Full. First, they didn't charge my points for the purchase. Second, I ordered a burger and it said it was 40 minutes late. So I ordered the milanea combo with tomato and lettuce. When I opened it, I saw what was in the photo. Disgraceful. A burnt bun and a very dry milanea. I added the ketchup. 😁 When I asked the cashier about the missing tomato and lettuce, she said, "I don't have any." I'd have let them know beforehand, and I'd have ordered something else! The price was still "full." 🤑.
The bathrooms were spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOeUlMTUFREAE
